combat: Win head-to-head collisions by moving into opponent predictably, forcing them into walls or self-collision; prioritize aggressive positioning over safety early.
endgame: When longer, aggressively shrink opponent space and cut off their escapes; when shorter, play defensive and stall safely near food, avoid traps.
space_control: Maintain max distance from walls and opponent; secure the center and key corridors to limit opponent's movement options; deny them food routes.
